title: Fix EC2 Zephyr builder native_sim host bootstrap gap
description: Why this exists: during project-LICHEN-t2hn.6 validation, a fresh Ubuntu EC2 Zephyr builder could mount the prepared EBS cache and build qemu/R1 targets, but native_sim builds were blocked before compile because the host image lacked gcc, system CMake/pip, and passwordless sudo for bootstrap/cleanup. What needs to be done: make the fresh EC2 workflow noninteractive by selecting or preparing an AMI/user-data path with host build tools and passwordless sudo, or teach the builder scripts to avoid these assumptions. Acceptance criteria: a fresh us-east-2a builder with vol-0875d0df8bdf82a58 can run native_sim direct tests and Twister without manual CMake workarounds, and can unmount/detach cleanly noninteractively.
notes: Implemented and validated the EC2 builder bootstrap fix on fresh instance i-018d81b234e3c5586 with persistent EBS vol-0875d0df8bdf82a58 mounted at /mnt/lichen-zephyr. Updated EBS cache scripts: /mnt/lichen-zephyr/scripts/bootstrap-host.sh now requires passwordless sudo, installs native_sim host compiler/tooling packages and commonly needed diagnostics/tools (build-essential, gcc/g++ multilib, cmake, ninja, gperf, ccache, dtc, libsdl2-dev, python dev/venv/pip, pipx, pkg-config, protobuf-compiler, rsync, lsof, strace, jq, ripgrep, tree, htop, tmux, screen, picocom, minicom, socat, netcat, usbutils, pciutils, lcov, gcovr, valgrind, shellcheck, awscli, gh), refreshes the cached Python venv with CMake/Ninja/west/pytest/gcovr, and pins setuptools<81 because Zephyr 3.7 Twister imports pkg_resources. Added /mnt/lichen-zephyr/scripts/aws-builder-user-data.sh to set up noninteractive sudo on fresh Ubuntu EC2 builders before mounting/running bootstrap. Appended EBS README bootstrap notes. Validation: shellcheck passed for bootstrap-host.sh; bootstrap-host.sh completed on fresh host in ~54s after cloud-init; gcc 11.4, CMake 4.3.4, Ninja 1.13, rg, jq, gh available; direct native_sim meshtastic_codec passed 13/13; direct native_sim meshtastic_adapter passed 18/18; Twister native_sim over lichen/tests/meshtastic_codec and lichen/tests/meshtastic_adapter passed 2/2 configurations and 31 test cases. EBS primary worktree was dirty/stale and could not fast-forward; used clean worktree /mnt/lichen-zephyr/work/project-LICHEN-t2hn521 for validation and created project-LICHEN-t2hn.5.2.2 for cleanup.
close_reason: Fresh EC2 builder bootstrap now works noninteractively with EBS-provided user-data/bootstrap scripts, native_sim direct tests pass, and Twister native_sim passes for Meshtastic codec/adapter.
